gui.politicalserver.powers2.title: Powers & Serums II
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_dash.de: Rocket forward in a blur of Viltrumite momentum.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_mega_pu: A single earth-shattering punch on whatever you look at.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_block.d: Brace yourself — incoming harm is heavily reduced.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_grab_sl: Seize a foe and slam them into the ground.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_orbital: Dive from above onto your mark, detonating the impact zone.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_impact_: Slam down to crater the ground and launch everything away.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_rage_su: Let fury rewrite your biology — strength, speed, and resilience.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_aerial_: Rain concussive blows on everything below while aloft.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_thunder: Clap the air into a shockwave that hurls foes back.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_skull_c: Focus crushing force on a single target's head.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_suborbi: Ascend briefly, then dive like a living missile.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_war_cry: A bellow that weakens and slows all who hear it.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_bone_sh: Shatter bone and will in a tight cone ahead.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_momentu: Barrel through everything in your path at boost speed.
power.politicalserver.viltrumite_superso: Break the sound barrier — extreme speed and flight.
power.politicalserver.homelander_beam.de: A searing chest-and-eye beam that scorches everything ahead.
power.politicalserver.atom_eve_shift.des: Reshape matter around you — heal allies, harm foes.
power.politicalserver.a_train_blur.desc: Move faster than the eye can follow.
power.politicalserver.queen_maevs_counte: Parry incoming harm and riposte with crushing force.
power.politicalserver.translucent_vanish: Turn fully invisible and slip through harm.
power.politicalserver.starlight_bolt.des: Fire a concentrated bolt of radiant energy.
A lethal ambush strike from the shadows.
power.politicalserver.soldier_boy_charge: Shoulder-charge forward, stunning and burning all you hit.
power.politicalserver.deep_tidal_crush.d: Summon a crushing wave that slows and damages.
power.politicalserver.mm_suppress.desc: Ground yourself and resist debuffs while striking back.
power.politicalserver.frenchie_arsenal.d: Detonate a cluster of improvised explosives ahead.
power.politicalserver.kimiko_blade_storm: A whirlwind of blades shreds everything nearby.
power.politicalserver.butcher_berserk.de: Temporary Compound-V fury — strength and lifesteal.
power.politicalserver.ryan_outburst.desc: Uncontrolled power burst — massive AoE, hard to aim.
power.politicalserver.neo_noir_echo.desc: Split an afterimage that strikes your target twice.
power.politicalserver.straw_doll.desc: Drive nails through an effigy — resonance damages your mark.
power.politicalserver.hairpin.desc: Launch cursed nails in a fan ahead.
power.politicalserver.boogie_woogie.desc: Clap to swap places with your target instantly.
power.politicalserver.copy_technique.des: Briefly mimic a foe's last technique as a burst of cursed energy.
power.politicalserver.rika_manifest.desc: Summon Rika's phantom to maul everything nearby.
power.politicalserver.star_rage.desc: Condense mass into overwhelming physical might.
power.politicalserver.judgeman.desc: Invoke trial — heavy debuffs rain on all ahead.
power.politicalserver.confiscation.desc: Strip a foe's strength and resistance for a time.
power.politicalserver.cursed_spirit_mani: Bind nearby curses to fight at your side.
power.politicalserver.disaster_plants.de: Erupt thorned vegetation that poisons and slows.
Harden skin with cursed scales — resistance and thorns.
power.politicalserver.antigravity_system: Reverse local gravity, launching foes upward.
power.politicalserver.bird_strike.desc: Send cursed crows diving through everything in line.
power.politicalserver.ice_formation.desc: Flash-freeze and shatter foes in a cone.
power.politicalserver.thunder_inspection: Electrocute a target and chain to nearby foes.
Split souls in the area, multiplying your damage.
power.politicalserver.blood_boiling.desc: Superheat blood in a cone (costs a little life).
power.politicalserver.curse_collage.desc: Absorb ambient curses to heal and buff yourself.
power.politicalserver.death_swarming.des: Release a swarm of insect curses that wither foes.
power.politicalserver.gamma_ray.desc: A focused beam of cursed radiation.
power.politicalserver.domain_infinite_vo: Floods minds with infinite information — blind, slow, and harm all within.
power.politicalserver.domain_time_cell.d: A temple of slowness — enemies crawl while you strike freely.
power.politicalserver.domain_handmade.de: A workshop of idle transfiguration — reshape all inside.
power.politicalserver.domain_mutual_love: A shrine of cleave and dismantle — relentless slashes within.
power.politicalserver.domain_deadly_sent: Court is in session — confiscate strength from all judged.
power.politicalserver.domain_cerebral.de: Bind minds and bodies in a web of cursed threads.
power.politicalserver.domain_idle_gamble: A casino of cursed fate — random bursts of fortune or ruin.
power.politicalserver.domain_womb.desc: Antigravity womb — float helpless foes while you attack.
power.politicalserver.domain_thunder_gaa: A storm shrine — lightning and paralysis within.
power.politicalserver.domain_horizon.des: An ocean domain — drown, slow, and crush all inside.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_purple_st: Unleash a storm of colliding cursed forces.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_maximum_u: Spiral all cursed energy into one annihilating orb.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_merged_be: Fuse shikigami into a single devastating assault.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_meteor_st: Call a barrage of cursed meteors across a wide area.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_open_shri: The shrine without a barrier — endless cleave in every direction.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_star_fall: Drop stellar mass — gravity, fire, and impact.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_viltrumit: Unleash full Viltrumite might — flight, beam, and ground zero.
power.politicalserver.ultimate_hero_squa: Channel the combined fury of every hero you've studied.
power.politicalserver.passive_ce_efficie: Toggle: cursed techniques cost slightly less CE over time.
power.politicalserver.passive_battle_fre: Toggle: gain strength while below half health.
power.politicalserver.passive_regen_aura: Toggle: slowly regenerate health out of combat.
power.politicalserver.passive_grade_pres: Toggle: weaken nearby foes below your grade.
power.politicalserver.passive_flight_mas: Toggle: Viltrumite flight throttle ramps faster.
power.politicalserver.passive_curse_resi: Toggle: resist poison, wither, and weakness.
power.politicalserver.passive_black_flas: Toggle: bonus distorted damage on critical hits.
